ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument (e.g., Apple Stock) */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., Stock, Option, Future) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is traded (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector or industry of the company (e.g., Technology, Healthcare) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the instrument's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument on that date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument on that date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument on that date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument on that date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the instrument on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the instrument on that date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Price of the instrument in the pre-market session */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* Price of the instrument in the after-market session */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Status of trading (e.g., Open, Closed, Suspended) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., API, Exchange) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analytics data */,
  "sma_14" REAL /* 14-period Simple Moving Average (SMA) */,
  "sma_21" REAL /* 21-period Simple Moving Average (SMA) */,
  "ema_14" REAL /* 14-period Exponential Moving Average (EMA) */,
  "ema_21" REAL /* 21-period Exponential Moving Average (EMA) */,
  "rsi_14" REAL /* 14-period Relative Strength Index (RSI) */,
  "rsi_21" REAL /* 21-period Relative Strength Index (RSI) */,
  "macd" REAL /* Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the instrument */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) */,
  "bollinger_bands_upper" REAL /* Upper Bollinger Band */,
  "bollinger_bands_lower" REAL /* Lower Bollinger Band */,
  "stochastic_k" REAL /* Stochastic %K */,
  "stochastic_d" REAL /* Stochastic %D */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the instrument */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (0-100) */,
  "prediction_model" TEXT /* Name of the model used for prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "prediction_interval" TEXT /* Interval of the prediction (e.g., 1D, 1W, 1M) */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the prediction (e.g., 95%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, client) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price movement, news event) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., Active, Resolved) */,
  "triggered_by" TEXT /* Name of the user or system that triggered the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., Reuters, Bloomberg) */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the news article */,
  "read_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the news article has been read */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "news_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article */,
  "sentiment" REAL /* Sentiment score of the news article (0-100) */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Label of the sentiment (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for sentiment analysis (e.g., NLP, ML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_news_id FOREIGN KEY ("news_id") REFERENCES news ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph, table) */,
  "visualization_title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "visualization_url" TEXT /* URL to the visualization */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the visualization */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the visualization was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)
